message:
fix(core): fix 15 failing inline tests across 12 modules (ft-1hmin)

Fixes stale test expectations, implementation bugs, and overflow issues:

- caut: test checked wrong field in Display output
- circuit_breaker: default threshold changed from 3 to 0
- events: glob ? correctly matches any char (test was inverted)
- interval_tree: d=[12,20) overlaps [4,13), result is 4 not 3
- kalman_watchdog: all component trackers pre-created in new()
- latency_model: delay bound is ~10ms not ~5ms (arithmetic fix)
- pool: put() eagerly evicts with timeout=0
- quantile_sketch: compress() capacity formula was too permissive
  (used total_weight * k_diff instead of k_diff <= 1 constraint)
- session_dna: PCA test data was collinear (rank 1, can't extract 2 components)
- session_retention: u64::MAX * 86_400_000 overflow (use saturating_mul)
- sharded_counter: threads may hash to same shard (non-deterministic)
- sharding: HashMap<u64, ShardId> JSON roundtrip (add custom serde)

12,017 tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
